pageIntro: No formal training, no gallery pedigree. Just a reason to make something honest.
bioParagraphs: I'm BWJ. Autistic Dane, based in Copenhagen, though the work still carries a few years in Pau, in the south of France.
Drawing and creating had always come in periods, but in 2021 it became something more deliberate — a way of getting rid of anxiety and restlessness. Five years on, it's become expression.

The practice has grown past spray paint, acrylic, and paper — sculpture and other three-dimensional work have found their way in too. The subject hasn't changed as much: still the feelings of youth, still what music and the world put in my head, just handled with a steadier hand.
quote: The message I try to send does not have to be the one perceived, as long as it makes you think the work is successful.
timelineIntro: From a CAS project in the IB program to a running archive of exhibited, published, and sold work.

timeline.title: Practice Begins
timeline.text: Drawing and creating had always come in periods — in 2021, it became a deliberate, daily way of managing anxiety and restlessness. The "Life" collection begins here.

timeline.title: Filmantiq — Ojo Vulgar, Paris
timeline.text: Group exhibition at Ojo Vulgar gallery, 15 Rue Dupin, Paris 6ème, on 18th November 2023. "Ho9e" sold at the show.

timeline.title: Published in Ojo Vulgar
timeline.text: Work featured in two Ojo Vulgar print editions: "Horssérie BIZARRES" and "El Crimen Perfecto."

timeline.title: Galleri X
timeline.text: Continued exhibition work at Galleri X, running through September 2025 — the most recent chapter so far.

timeline.title: Expanding the Practice
timeline.text: Sculpture and other three-dimensional work have entered the practice alongside painting and paper.

exhibitNote: Ojo Vulgar Gallery, 15 Rue Dupin, Paris 6ème.
